title: [Brayern Isle, Fortress Approach]
description: The view from this path sees the beach below, the docks, and the mana storm.  The roiling, electric blue hues of the storm are in sharp contrast to the softer, whitecapped waves beneath them.  Both are like a painting when compared to the jungle's darker greens.  To one side, the jungle blocks one's advance.  To the other, tall blue-green logs form a fortress wall with lanterns and several violet-hued banners hanging from it.  A flat patch of dirt and volcanic rock away from the wall is home to a small bonfire encircled by river rocks.
